name: ngsrv
description: MCP server for ngsrv tunnels. Expose a local HTTP port on a public HTTPS URL from Cursor or Claude Desktop.

api_token.title: ngsrv API token
api_token.description: Agent or standard token from ngsrv.com dashboard. Leave empty for a 12-hour device trial.

device_id.title: Device ID
device_id.description: Stable ID for trial provisioning. Auto-generated if omitted.

prompts.name: tunnel.quickstart
prompts.description: Step-by-step prompt to expose a local dev server on a public HTTPS URL.
prompts.text: Expose my local HTTP server on port 3000 with ngsrv using tunnel.start.

prompts.name: docs.setup
prompts.description: Show how to add ngsrv MCP to Cursor or Claude Desktop.
prompts.text: Show ngsrv MCP setup with npx -y @ngsrv/mcp and optional NGSRV_API_TOKEN.
